title.en: SOLAR HEAT COLLECTORS; SOLAR HEAT SYSTEMS (for producing mechanical power from solar energy F03G6/00)
Solar heat collectors using working fluids
the working fluids forming pools or ponds
having circuits for two or more working fluids (with means for exchanging heat between two or more fluids F24S10/30)
having two or more passages for the same working fluid layered in direction of solar-rays, e.g. having upper circulation channels connected with lower circulation channels
with means for exchanging heat between two or more working fluids
in absorbing elements surrounded by transparent enclosures, e.g. evacuated solar collectors
the working fluids being conveyed between plates
the working fluids trickling freely over absorbing elements
the working fluids being conveyed through tubular absorbing conduits

comprising porous material or permeable masses directly contacting the working fluids (for conveying liquefied working fluid from evaporator sections to condenser sections with capillary force F24S10/95)
using internal thermosiphonic circulation
